54280529.title: Grand Northern Ukulele Festival
54280529.extract: The Grand Northern Ukulele Festival (GNUF) was a multi-award-winning UK-based ukulele festival which took place annually between 2013 and 2023. It was established in 2013 and has been the recipient of multiple awards including the "Queen's Award for Voluntary Service". as well as the "Epic Award for England (Now the Creative Lives Awards".. It was also given the "Best Ukulele Festival award from UKE Magazine".
